name: aveniq
description: Aveniq — a MERN e-commerce marketplace (React 19 + Redux Toolkit frontend, Express 5 + MongoDB backend). This root package orchestrates the two workspaces.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
